requested_suite_presence.resolution: all requested suites remain present; this cycle used targeted branding reruns plus a covered post-fix verification because the concrete blocker was a shared startup-timeout flake in the real-server harness

bootstrap_attempts.resolution: the local API bootstrapped successfully enough to complete a full 17-of-17 self-scan before any source changes were required

notes: the fresh autonomous self-scan was already fully green at the start of this pass, so the remaining regression was not in the live Aldeci workflow itself
the actionable failures emerged only in real-server branding tests that timed out while the API was still making observable startup progress

validation_runs.name: autonomous_cycle_baseline_current_cycle
notes: the live autonomous path was already healthy before the harness fix
this ruled out a product-side branding regression as the primary blocker for the cycle

validation_runs.name: focused_autonomous_successor_initial
notes: both failures were the branding API header and persistence tests
stderr showed ongoing startup progress instead of a fatal crash, implicating the shared readiness timeout

validation_runs.name: high_visibility_initial
notes: the same two branding API tests failed here, reinforcing that the issue was shared harness behavior rather than a single suite anomaly
the narrow slice remained below the unchanged repository-wide coverage denominator when run alone

validation_runs.name: branding_targeted_post_fix
notes: this rerun proved that the exact previously failing startup path was healthy after the harness change

validation_runs.name: covered_post_fix_verification
notes: the main covered autonomous-foundation slice returned to green under the unchanged repository coverage gate
the branding tests now pass inside the broader suite context as well

code_changes.summary: added fatal/progress startup markers and a one-time conditional 30-second grace window for slow but healthy API cold starts
updated the branch status narrative with the startup-timeout diagnosis, remediation, and verification evidence

remaining_risks: the post-fix evidence includes a targeted branding rerun and a covered suite rerun, but not a full post-fix rerun of the pre-fix high-visibility slice
full API cold-start latency may still be close to the original readiness boundary on some environments, so additional timing telemetry would improve confidence
the self-scan backlog remains at 78 SAST findings and 15 surfaced findings even though the workflow is operationally healthy

recommended_next_actions.action: commit the shared harness fix and refreshed evidence once repository status is reviewed
recommended_next_actions.rationale: the exact failing path and the main covered suite both now verify green

recommended_next_actions.action: optionally rerun the full high-visibility slice post-fix if a symmetric before-and-after artifact is desired
recommended_next_actions.rationale: the current high-visibility log documents the failure state while the post-fix evidence is targeted plus covered

recommended_next_actions.action: capture startup-duration telemetry in the real-server harness
recommended_next_actions.rationale: quantitative cold-start data would support future timeout tuning without broadening failure windows blindly

recommended_next_actions.action: resume backlog reduction on self-scan findings
recommended_next_actions.rationale: the validation harness is now trustworthy again, but the security backlog itself is still materially present
